info.title: efbench
info.description: An educational tool for EF Core and SQL Server design

commands.name: primary-keys
commands.description: Runs tests to evaluate performance of different primary key types.

arguments.name: count
arguments.description: Number of parent entities to seed. [default: 1000]

commands.name: linter
commands.description: Tests performance implications of linter warnings

arguments.name: warning
arguments.description: The warning to test the performance of [default: S6603]
